records.m_Talk_ENG: In a nutshell... the Holy Grail is a living human.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In a nutshell... the Holy Grail is a living human.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In a nutshell... the Holy Grail is a living human.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At least that is what the Society thinks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At least that is what the Society thinks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At least that is what the Society thinks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Holy Grail is a person?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Holy Grail is a person?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Holy Grail is a person?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What kind of nonsense is that, paper nun?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What kind of nonsense is that, paper nun?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What kind of nonsense is that, paper nun?

records.m_Talk_ENG: During the last sacred mission, the Miracle Investigation Council investigated a pagan village in the Anti-Administration Zone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: During the last sacred mission, the Miracle Investigation Council investigated a pagan village in the Anti-Administration Zone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: During the last sacred mission, the Miracle Investigation Council investigated a pagan village in the Anti-Administration Zone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There were reports of mass mania and civil unrest occurring over there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There were reports of mass mania and civil unrest occurring over there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There were reports of mass mania and civil unrest occurring over there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the end, it was found out that the place was used by the then-President, Anna MacCready, for her ritual.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the end, it was found out that the place was used by the then-President, Anna MacCready, for her ritual.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, it was found out that the place was used by the then-President, Anna MacCready, for her ritual.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that's why you reacted to the name, Anna MacCready.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that's why you reacted to the name, Anna MacCready.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that's why you reacted to the name, Anna MacCready.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I am embarrassed to admit that I only realized after hearing that name.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I am embarrassed to admit that I only realized after hearing that name.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I am embarrassed to admit that I only realized after hearing that name.

records.m_Talk_ENG: According to the investigation's findings, Anna MacCready has long sought a vessel to transfer her consciousness for eternal life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: According to the investigation's findings, Anna MacCready has long sought a vessel to transfer her consciousness for eternal life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: According to the investigation's findings, Anna MacCready has long sought a vessel to transfer her consciousness for eternal life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In other words, there were more facilities besides that pagan village that were used for choosing the right vessel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In other words, there were more facilities besides that pagan village that were used for choosing the right vessel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In other words, there were more facilities besides that pagan village that were used for choosing the right vessel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have also witnessed the pagan child whom we rescued being possessed by <color=#ffd34c>something</color> myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have also witnessed the pagan child whom we rescued being possessed by <color=#ffd34c>something</color> myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have also witnessed the pagan child whom we rescued being possessed by <color=#ffd34c>something</color> myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I interrogated her myself to read her, but the results of that were...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I interrogated her myself to read her, but the results of that were...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I interrogated her myself to read her, but the results of that were...

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-how did it go?
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-how did it go?
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-how did it go?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A lot had happened.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A lot had happened.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A lot had happened.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I see. Sorry for asking.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I see. Sorry for asking.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I see. Sorry for asking.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... anyway...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... anyway...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... anyway...

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is an interpretation that god made mankind in his own image, made them from dust, and breathed life into them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is an interpretation that god made mankind in his own image, made them from dust, and breathed life into them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is an interpretation that god made mankind in his own image, made them from dust, and breathed life into them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thus, if we compare a human body to a <color=#ffd34c>vessel</color> here...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thus, if we compare a human body to a <color=#ffd34c>vessel</color> here...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thus, if we compare a human body to a <color=#ffd34c>vessel</color> here...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Holy Grail is a vessel that can contain the blood of god.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Holy Grail is a vessel that can contain the blood of god.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Holy Grail is a vessel that can contain the blood of god.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In other words, it is referring to a human with an <color=#ffd34c>idiosyncratic body type</color> that can embrace a divine being.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In other words, it is referring to a human with an <color=#ffd34c>idiosyncratic body type</color> that can embrace a divine being.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In other words, it is referring to a human with an <color=#ffd34c>idiosyncratic body type</color> that can embrace a divine being.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A human with an idiosyncratic body type.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A human with an idiosyncratic body type.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A human with an idiosyncratic body type.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So a vessel is something similar to the case of Liona Hartt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So a vessel is something similar to the case of Liona Hartt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So a vessel is something similar to the case of Liona Hartt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then it's obvious why James is searching for the Holy Grail.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then it's obvious why James is searching for the Holy Grail.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then it's obvious why James is searching for the Holy Grail.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As always, you catch on fast, Morgan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As always, you catch on fast, Morgan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As always, you catch on fast, Morgan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He is trying to summon what should not be summoned to the Normalside through the Holy Grail.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He is trying to summon what should not be summoned to the Normalside through the Holy Grail.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He is trying to summon what should not be summoned to the Normalside through the Holy Grail.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sheesh, that's bloody complicated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sheesh, that's bloody complicated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sheesh, that's bloody complicated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look, I'm not that bright, so this takes me a while to get my head around.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look, I'm not that bright, so this takes me a while to get my head around.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look, I'm not that bright, so this takes me a while to get my head around.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, then how about a refresher to help you understand?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, then how about a refresher to help you understand?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, then how about a refresher to help you understand?

records.m_Talk_ENG: 17 years ago, your grandfather and Cardinal Johan fought James over the Fragment at the Holy Curia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: 17 years ago, your grandfather and Cardinal Johan fought James over the Fragment at the Holy Curia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: 17 years ago, your grandfather and Cardinal Johan fought James over the Fragment at the Holy Curia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a result, the Fragment went missing, but the two kept searching for it in secret.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a result, the Fragment went missing, but the two kept searching for it in secret.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a result, the Fragment went missing, but the two kept searching for it in secret.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing how they borrowed dimensional ships, I'm certain the Fragment is in the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing how they borrowed dimensional ships, I'm certain the Fragment is in the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing how they borrowed dimensional ships, I'm certain the Fragment is in the Counterside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh...! So that's what the Dean of Archeology meant by creating a dimensional rift using Elysium's instrument!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh...! So that's what the Dean of Archeology meant by creating a dimensional rift using Elysium's instrument!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh...! So that's what the Dean of Archeology meant by creating a dimensional rift using Elysium's instrument!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? The Professor's going to create a dimensional rift? That's the first I'm hearing about it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? The Professor's going to create a dimensional rift? That's the first I'm hearing about it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? The Professor's going to create a dimensional rift? That's the first I'm hearing about it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! That was supposed to be a secret! Oops!kz
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! That was supposed to be a secret! Oops!kz
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! That was supposed to be a secret! Oops!kz

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anna MacCready is someone who devoted her entire life for immortality.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anna MacCready is someone who devoted her entire life for immortality.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anna MacCready is someone who devoted her entire life for immortality.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She must have believed that she would be able to locate the Lake someday through immortal life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She must have believed that she would be able to locate the Lake someday through immortal life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She must have believed that she would be able to locate the Lake someday through immortal life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, the Holy Curia's Fragment the Professor mentioned is referring to a test subject. The vessel for the Holy Grail experiment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, the Holy Curia's Fragment the Professor mentioned is referring to a test subject. The vessel for the Holy Grail experiment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, the Holy Curia's Fragment the Professor mentioned is referring to a test subject. The vessel for the Holy Grail experiment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, then that means...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, then that means...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, then that means...

records.m_Talk_ENG: someone who disappeared decades ago has been drifting in the Counterside all this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: someone who disappeared decades ago has been drifting in the Counterside all this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: someone who disappeared decades ago has been drifting in the Counterside all this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, can we even find this person? What if this person's already turned into a C.O.?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, can we even find this person? What if this person's already turned into a C.O.?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, can we even find this person? What if this person's already turned into a C.O.?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is nothing we can guarantee in the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is nothing we can guarantee in the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is nothing we can guarantee in the Counterside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is said that sometimes, time in the hyperdepths of the Counterside and the Normalside tends to flow differently.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is said that sometimes, time in the hyperdepths of the Counterside and the Normalside tends to flow differently.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is said that sometimes, time in the hyperdepths of the Counterside and the Normalside tends to flow differently.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I believe Sir Burnett was trying to take responsibility for the failure of that day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I believe Sir Burnett was trying to take responsibility for the failure of that day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I believe Sir Burnett was trying to take responsibility for the failure of that day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He must have wished to allay concerns about the future... by using the Institution's approach to destroy the Holy Grail.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He must have wished to allay concerns about the future... by using the Institution's approach to destroy the Holy Grail.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He must have wished to allay concerns about the future... by using the Institution's approach to destroy the Holy Grail.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Diving into a dimensional rift without a ship is basically committing suicide.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Diving into a dimensional rift without a ship is basically committing suicide.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Diving into a dimensional rift without a ship is basically committing suicide.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In order to increase one's chances of success as much as possible, one must aim to dive in a place where a rift has already been opened before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In order to increase one's chances of success as much as possible, one must aim to dive in a place where a rift has already been opened before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In order to increase one's chances of success as much as possible, one must aim to dive in a place where a rift has already been opened before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because even if you don't know the coordinates, a place where a rift occurred is likely to be connected to the same world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because even if you don't know the coordinates, a place where a rift occurred is likely to be connected to the same world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because even if you don't know the coordinates, a place where a rift occurred is likely to be connected to the same world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And James seems to know where the test subject was caught up in a dimensional rift 17 years ago.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And James seems to know where the test subject was caught up in a dimensional rift 17 years ago.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And James seems to know where the test subject was caught up in a dimensional rift 17 years ago.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To catch James, we need to get there before he does and ambush him.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To catch James, we need to get there before he does and ambush him.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To catch James, we need to get there before he does and ambush him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And where's that exactly?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And where's that exactly?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And where's that exactly?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ahem.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ahem.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ahem.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't like cooperating with the Society, but I suppose we have no other choice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't like cooperating with the Society, but I suppose we have no other choice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't like cooperating with the Society, but I suppose we have no other choice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rivet, right? It seems like our objectives seem to be in line...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rivet, right? It seems like our objectives seem to be in line...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rivet, right? It seems like our objectives seem to be in line...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you say? Fancy a team-up?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you say? Fancy a team-up?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you say? Fancy a team-up?

records.m_Talk_ENG: As if! Why would I join forces with Prydwen when I get nothing in return?
records.m_Talk_DEU: As if! Why would I join forces with Prydwen when I get nothing in return?
records.m_Talk_FRA: As if! Why would I join forces with Prydwen when I get nothing in return?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, that is true...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, that is true...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, that is true...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then how about this? Once everything is settled, I'll hand over James to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then how about this? Once everything is settled, I'll hand over James to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then how about this? Once everything is settled, I'll hand over James to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whether you kill him or keep him alive, that's up to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whether you kill him or keep him alive, that's up to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whether you kill him or keep him alive, that's up to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, old chap! You're really going to trust her?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, old chap! You're really going to trust her?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, old chap! You're really going to trust her?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anna MacCready's dead. And even her facilities for selecting vessels don't exist anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anna MacCready's dead. And even her facilities for selecting vessels don't exist anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anna MacCready's dead. And even her facilities for selecting vessels don't exist anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, if we want intel about that location, we need an informant from the Society.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, if we want intel about that location, we need an informant from the Society.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, if we want intel about that location, we need an informant from the Society.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sure about this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sure about this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sure about this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Weren't you just in it to give that Professor a punch in the face?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Weren't you just in it to give that Professor a punch in the face?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Weren't you just in it to give that Professor a punch in the face?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! But no backstabbing, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! But no backstabbing, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! But no backstabbing, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you betray me, I'm gonna put skewers in your body until there's no more room!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you betray me, I'm gonna put skewers in your body until there's no more room!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you betray me, I'm gonna put skewers in your body until there's no more room!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, don't worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, don't worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, don't worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A gentleman never lies.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A gentleman never lies.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A gentleman never lies.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing how they borrowed dimensional ships, I'm certain the Fragment is in the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing how they borrowed dimensional ships, I'm certain the Fragment is in the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing how they borrowed dimensional ships, I'm certain the Fragment is in the Counterside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh...! So that's what the Dean of Archeology meant by creating a dimensional rift using Elysium's instrument!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh...! So that's what the Dean of Archeology meant by creating a dimensional rift using Elysium's instrument!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh...! So that's what the Dean of Archeology meant by creating a dimensional rift using Elysium's instrument!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? The Professor's going to create a dimensional rift? That's the first I'm hearing about it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? The Professor's going to create a dimensional rift? That's the first I'm hearing about it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? The Professor's going to create a dimensional rift? That's the first I'm hearing about it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! That was supposed to be a secret! Oops!kz
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! That was supposed to be a secret! Oops!kz
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! That was supposed to be a secret! Oops!kz

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anna MacCready is someone who devoted her entire life for immortality.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anna MacCready is someone who devoted her entire life for immortality.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anna MacCready is someone who devoted her entire life for immortality.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She must have believed that she would be able to locate the Lake someday through immortal life.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She must have believed that she would be able to locate the Lake someday through immortal life.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She must have believed that she would be able to locate the Lake someday through immortal life.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, the Holy Curia's Fragment the Professor mentioned is referring to a test subject. The vessel for the Holy Grail experiment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, the Holy Curia's Fragment the Professor mentioned is referring to a test subject. The vessel for the Holy Grail experiment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, the Holy Curia's Fragment the Professor mentioned is referring to a test subject. The vessel for the Holy Grail experiment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, then that means...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, then that means...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, then that means...

root.m_Talk_ENG: someone who disappeared decades ago has been drifting in the Counterside all this time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: someone who disappeared decades ago has been drifting in the Counterside all this time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: someone who disappeared decades ago has been drifting in the Counterside all this time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, can we even find this person? What if this person's already turned into a C.O.?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, can we even find this person? What if this person's already turned into a C.O.?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, can we even find this person? What if this person's already turned into a C.O.?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is nothing we can guarantee in the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is nothing we can guarantee in the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is nothing we can guarantee in the Counterside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is said that sometimes, time in the hyperdepths of the Counterside and the Normalside tends to flow differently.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is said that sometimes, time in the hyperdepths of the Counterside and the Normalside tends to flow differently.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is said that sometimes, time in the hyperdepths of the Counterside and the Normalside tends to flow differently.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I believe Sir Burnett was trying to take responsibility for the failure of that day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I believe Sir Burnett was trying to take responsibility for the failure of that day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I believe Sir Burnett was trying to take responsibility for the failure of that day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: He must have wished to allay concerns about the future... by using the Institution's approach to destroy the Holy Grail.
root.m_Talk_DEU: He must have wished to allay concerns about the future... by using the Institution's approach to destroy the Holy Grail.
root.m_Talk_FRA: He must have wished to allay concerns about the future... by using the Institution's approach to destroy the Holy Grail.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Diving into a dimensional rift without a ship is basically committing suicide.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Diving into a dimensional rift without a ship is basically committing suicide.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Diving into a dimensional rift without a ship is basically committing suicide.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In order to increase one's chances of success as much as possible, one must aim to dive in a place where a rift has already been opened before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In order to increase one's chances of success as much as possible, one must aim to dive in a place where a rift has already been opened before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In order to increase one's chances of success as much as possible, one must aim to dive in a place where a rift has already been opened before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because even if you don't know the coordinates, a place where a rift occurred is likely to be connected to the same world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because even if you don't know the coordinates, a place where a rift occurred is likely to be connected to the same world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because even if you don't know the coordinates, a place where a rift occurred is likely to be connected to the same world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And James seems to know where the test subject was caught up in a dimensional rift 17 years ago.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And James seems to know where the test subject was caught up in a dimensional rift 17 years ago.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And James seems to know where the test subject was caught up in a dimensional rift 17 years ago.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To catch James, we need to get there before he does and ambush him.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To catch James, we need to get there before he does and ambush him.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To catch James, we need to get there before he does and ambush him.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And where's that exactly?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And where's that exactly?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And where's that exactly?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ahem.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ahem.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ahem.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't like cooperating with the Society, but I suppose we have no other choice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't like cooperating with the Society, but I suppose we have no other choice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't like cooperating with the Society, but I suppose we have no other choice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Rivet, right? It seems like our objectives seem to be in line...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Rivet, right? It seems like our objectives seem to be in line...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Rivet, right? It seems like our objectives seem to be in line...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you say? Fancy a team-up?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you say? Fancy a team-up?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you say? Fancy a team-up?

root.m_Talk_ENG: As if! Why would I join forces with Prydwen when I get nothing in return?
root.m_Talk_DEU: As if! Why would I join forces with Prydwen when I get nothing in return?
root.m_Talk_FRA: As if! Why would I join forces with Prydwen when I get nothing in return?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, that is true...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, that is true...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, that is true...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then how about this? Once everything is settled, I'll hand over James to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then how about this? Once everything is settled, I'll hand over James to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then how about this? Once everything is settled, I'll hand over James to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whether you kill him or keep him alive, that's up to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whether you kill him or keep him alive, that's up to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whether you kill him or keep him alive, that's up to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, old chap! You're really going to trust her?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, old chap! You're really going to trust her?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, old chap! You're really going to trust her?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anna MacCready's dead. And even her facilities for selecting vessels don't exist anymore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anna MacCready's dead. And even her facilities for selecting vessels don't exist anymore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anna MacCready's dead. And even her facilities for selecting vessels don't exist anymore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, if we want intel about that location, we need an informant from the Society.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, if we want intel about that location, we need an informant from the Society.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, if we want intel about that location, we need an informant from the Society.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sure about this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sure about this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sure about this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Weren't you just in it to give that Professor a punch in the face?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Weren't you just in it to give that Professor a punch in the face?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Weren't you just in it to give that Professor a punch in the face?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! But no backstabbing, okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! But no backstabbing, okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! But no backstabbing, okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you betray me, I'm gonna put skewers in your body until there's no more room!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you betray me, I'm gonna put skewers in your body until there's no more room!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you betray me, I'm gonna put skewers in your body until there's no more room!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, don't worry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, don't worry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, don't worry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A gentleman never lies.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A gentleman never lies.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A gentleman never lies.
